DUBAI, UAE • NOVEMBER 2026 • 3RD GRAND EDITION

The grand return of the UAE's premier celebration! Back for our monumental 3rd edition, experience spectacular adrenaline, authentic Mexican Wrestling, mariachi, kermesse, and high-flying mask-wearing action, fusing perfectly with the premium magic of Dubai!

VIVA MÉXICO EN DUBAI • EDITION III

Back by Popular Demand: The Boldest, Most Colorful Mexican Festival in the UAE!

Following two spectacularly successful, sold-out runs, the Lucha Mexicana Fest 2026 returns for its highly anticipated third installment. It is uniquely engineered to captivate the UAE with a high-energy fusion of traditional sports, premium family entertainment, elite gastronomy, and Latin corporate representation.

Over three spectacular days, experience a lively Mexican "Kermesse" right in Dubai, as outlined in Concepto del evento LLF - Nov Festival Mexicano.docx. This third edition matches adrenaline-pumping, high-flying acrobatics with the cultural prestige of Mexican art, music, crafts, and delicious tastes.

3rd Edition

Triumphant Return

100% Authentic

Mexican Talent

👺
THE SPIRIT OF THE MASK

"The mask is sacred. In Mexico, the wrestler becomes a hero, a demigod, defending honor, tradition, and custom."

Técnicos (Heroes) Rudos (Villains)
EXPLORE THE FESTIVAL

The 4 Spectacular Zones

Discover the four key cultural landmarks designed to replicate a majestic Mexican atmosphere under Dubai's skies as detailed in LLF - Website content.docx.

CULINARY EXPERIENCE

Los Portales Gastronomy

No Mexican festival is complete without the world-renowned taste of authentic Mexican cuisine. "Los Portales" recreates the traditional corridors of old-world colonial Mexican cities where delicious aromas waft through the air.

  • Tacos, tamales, sopes, and custom freshly-made quesadillas.
  • Top Dubai partners including Maria Bonita and Lila Molino.
  • Masterclasses from visiting Mexican master chefs.
Featured Brands:
Maria Bonita Lila Molino La Patrona
🌮🔥

EL RINCÓN DEL TACO

Enjoy fresh salsa bars, traditional recipes, and handmade stone-ground tortillas.

FAMILY ARENA & CLUB DE PEKES

The Mexican Plaza

A dedicated environment built for families, expats, locals, and children alike. Recreating a traditional municipal plaza, this area features our premier Club de Pekes!

  • Club de Pekes (Kids Zone): Dynamic storytelling and interactive kids activities.
  • Pinata-smashing contests and folklore face-painting.
  • Fun interactive areas featuring kid-friendly Lucha photo-booths and mask workshops!
🪅

Special collaborations and community guests including the Al Jalila Foundation kids initiative!

🎺🪅 Club de Pekes

FAMILY KERMESSE

Traditional music, live dancers, and mini ring action for the next generation of luchadores!

BUSINESS & SOUK

Latin Colors / El Mercado

Discover the active essence of Mexican entrepreneurship in Dubai! The "Mexican Business Souk" connects local consumers and global entities with authentic Mexican firms, artisans, and products.

  • Kermesse-style booths showcasing handcrafted decor and colorful fabrics.
  • Direct trade partnerships from leading Latin & Mexican companies.
  • Traditional design objects, apparel, and mask-makers.
In Collaboration with: Mexican Business Council TradeMex
🛍️🏺

EL MERCADO DE COLORES

Sustainably made merchandise, traditional artisanal design, and professional networking.

VIP & ADULTS

The Mexican Cantina

Unwind in our stylishly lit, premium Cantina. Relish signature curated non-alcoholic & alcoholic agave mocktails, traditional refreshers, and premium visual setups with gorgeous traditional music.

  • Signature imported Jarritos sodas and custom regional refreshments.
  • Expert mixologists presenting unique regional flavor pairings.
  • Exclusive VIP lounges for ringside comfort and premium views.
Featured Refreshment Partner: Jarritos Sodas
🍹🍋

THE MEXICAN CANTINA

Premium VIP social lounge presenting spectacular agave concepts, energetic beats, and fresh dynamic drinks.

OUR MONUMENTAL THIRD EDITION

THE SPECTACLE: LUCHA LIBRE

Prepare to be fascinated for the third time in Dubai! Experience spectacular, lightning-fast displays of gravity-defying aerial maneuvers, intense dramatic rivalries, and the iconic, colorful masks that define this electrifying world-class sport.

Aerial High-Flying

Gravity-defying flips, springboard dives, and dynamic double under-hooks. Witness authentic, explosive choreography directly from Mexico's top gyms.

Iconic Colorful Masks

The mask represents identity. In a battle of honor, some combatants put their masks on the line! Admire custom embroidery, leathercraft, and legendary family legacy masks.

Legendary Matches

From classical Técnico vs. Rudo tags, to thrilling women's champion championships. Two different shows in one single event day (Family show & Extreme technical VIP show).

Elite International Athletes

Over our previous editions, we've proudly brought superstars directly from Mexico to Dubai, including Tinieblas Jr, Alushe, Huracan Ramirez Jr., Lady Apache, Karisma, Super Astro Jr, Cucui, Diablo Azteca, Gravity, and more. Expect even greater legends for November 2026!

9+ Mexican Masters Pro Wrestling Revolution Stars Championship Events

🎪 CLUB DE PEKES
👶 KIDS & TEENS ARENA FAMILY FIRST

Club de Pekes: A Magical Cultural Playground

Designed to resemble a typical festive Mexican Kermesse, the Club de Pekes provides a vibrant, secure, and highly entertaining space for kids of all backgrounds to explore Mexican art, crafts, and culture in Dubai.

Following our successful collaboration with the Al Jalila Foundation in previous editions, the Club de Pekes is back bigger than ever to deliver joy, cultural integration, and physical activities for the little ones.

🎨

Craft Workshops

Guided mask-making and drawing classes where kids design their own legendary Luchador characters.

🪅

Traditional Piñatas

Experience the absolute joy of authentic clay and paper piñata-smashing filled with traditional sweets!

🤸‍♀️

Mini Wrestling Ring

A safe, soft supervised miniature ring space for active sports routines, games, and dramatic hero poses.

OUR REPUTATION IN THE UAE

The Journey So Far

We aren't newcomers! Our history is built on spectacular successes delivering genuine high-caliber, authentic sports showcases to local Emirati families and global fans.

Edition I: The Debut NOV 5 - 9, 2024

First Mexican Wrestling Event in UAE

A historical milestone introducing iconic sports action to the GCC. Fans cheered direct-from-Mexico legendary characters in an energy-packed five-day showcase with unbelievable action.

Iconic Roster:
Tinieblas Jr Alushe Huracán Ramírez Jr. Capitán Morgan Lady Apache
7 Famous Wrestlers
300 Festival Attendees
250 Main Event Fans
Edition II: Pro Wrestling Revolution 2 EVENTS IN ONE DAY

Expanding the Spectacle

An advanced layout with Pro Wrestling Revolution. Initiated with a joyful Morning Kids Show (collaborating with Al Jalila Foundation) followed by a high-intensity, strong technical Night Event with VIP luxury spaces.

Featured Athletes:
Super Astro Jr Cucui Karisma Diablo Azteca Gravity Lancelot
9 Famous Wrestlers
500+ Show Viewers
The Space Elite Sports Venue
